GENOTYPES.cultivar_notes: Exp2. one of the two highest yielding DH lines from Exp.1, selected from S1
Exp2. one of the two highest yielding DH lines from Exp.1, selected from S2
Exp2. one of two high yielding Chilean cultivars released by breeding programs: Pandora-INIA from the National Wheat Program
Exp.2 one of two high yielding Chilean cultivars released by breeding programs:Invento-BAER released by one of the most important private-sector Chilean wheat breeders (Semillas Baer)
